title: lecanorchis subpelorica var. latens
intro: Lecanorchis subpelorica var. latens is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Japan, characterized by its unique, low-growing habit and white or pale yellow flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine, valued for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lecanorchis subpelorica var. latens are thought to include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or supplements.
